items.title: Ranking Guardiola's 18 seasons as manager: Which c...
items.summary: Pep Guardiola is leaving Man City after 10 stunning seasons, and with 18 full campaigns in his career across three big clubs, we ranked each one from best to worst.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: FIFA World Cup rosters: USMNT squad revealed as Mauricio Pochettino names ten defenders, no Diego Luna
items.summary: Thomas Tuchel has announced the England squad and there are some big surprises, with Ivan Toney making the cut
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Rashid and Zadran rested for one-off Test against India
items.summary: They will return for the three-match ODI series against India, which takes place from June 13 to 20
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
